title: AI boom lifts Nokia sales, shares hit 16-year high after earnings beat
description: Nokia raised the growth targets for its artificial intelligence business on Thursday, after the network gear maker beat market expectations for quarterly comparable operating ​profit, sending its shares to their highest level in 16 years..
content:

title: SoftBank seeks $10 billion margin loan backed by OpenAI shares: Bloomberg
description: SoftBank is reportedly seeking a massive $10 billion loan, leveraging its stake in ChatGPT's creator, OpenAI. This move signals the Japanese tech giant's intensified commitment to artificial intelligence, following a period of significant financial volatility. The loan, potentially extendable, follows a substantial $40 billion bridge loan secured earlier this year to fuel further AI investments.

title: As AI evolves, people debate whether machines deserve feelings and rights
description: Humanoid robots powered by artificial intelligence are moving from science fiction to daily life, raising ethical and legal questions worldwide. Thai philosopher and artificial intelligence ethics expert tells the Bangkok Post that if machines one day gain self-awareness, they may deserve basic rights and protection. As Thailand and the global technology industry debate robot welfare, morality and law, the prospect of humans and machines sharing a future is no longer theoretical.

title: Dr AI: How Irish medics are using tools to help with diagnosis and treatment
description: More than one in two doctors reported using AI (artificial intelligence) in clinical practice within the last year and one in five look to it daily.
content:
And one in three report encountering patients presenting with AI-generated information in the previous month, according to the joint study by EY and the Royal College of Physicians of Ireland (RCPI) .

title: K-Logistikus integrates AI to redefine logistics in the Philippines
description: ACROSS industries, logistics is undergoing a fundamental shift. The growing complexity of supply chains, coupled with rising customer expectations for speed and transparency, is pushing companies to rethink how goods move from origin to destination. At the center of this transformation is artificial intelligence (AI), enabling businesses to operate with greater precision, efficiency and foresight.
